prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ETS', seasonality_champion='rf', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: ETS dominates trend tracking with lowest slope error (0.0989), while rf excels at seasonality capture (0.8161 correlation) and overall RMSE (74.62). High model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.29) and substantial seasonality variance (0.73) indicate models capture patterns very differently, strongly supporting DBA combination to leverage diverse strengths across trend and seasonal components.

High model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.29) and substantial seasonality variance (0.73) indicate models capture patterns very differently, strongly supporting DBA combination to leverage diverse strengths across trend and seasonal components."

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: ETS dominates trend tracking with lowest slope error (0.0989), while rf excels at seasonality capture (0.8161 correlation) and overall RMSE (74.62). High model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.29) and substantial seasonality variance (0.73) indicate models capture patterns very differently, strongly supporting DBA combination to leverage diverse strengths across trend and seasonal components.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=9 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity, supporting best_per_horizon_by_validation and topk_mean_per_horizon_k3. relative_spread_mean=0.44 (≥0.25) and high_seasonality_variance=0.73 strongly favor dba_combination as recommended by pattern_analyst_insights. RMSE spread ratio=1.29 between rf(74.84) and ONLY_FT_rf(181.45) justifies inverse_rmse_weights with shrinkage=0.35 for stability. score_preset_recommendation='rmse_focus' aligns with high model dispersion.
